title: Project 4J Server
body:
## P4J Server-sided modpack
### Host a timeline where Legacy Console Edition had mods!


**Looking for regular version? Download** [here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/project-4j)

# Crashing?
Please change `level-type` output to `level-type=moderner_beta\:moderner_beta`

> _Still Crashing❓_

Report bug to [GitHub](https://github.com/Cixon/project4j/issues) and send `latest.log` & `crash-report`

# Recommendation
**🎮 Please use a controller for a better playthrough! 🎮**

(Ps3/4, Xbox, Switch)

Allocate at **least 4GB** to server!

### Special Thanks
- [Blackgear](https://modrinth.com/user/ItsBlackgear) for reverting old skeleton AI using their mod Stay Still ឵឵       
- [Jab125](https://modrinth.com/user/Jab125) for allowing me to package a very early build of their Limited Worlds mod!
- [Purple_Zombie](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/purple_zombie/) for inspiration on custom mobs based off their cool Mob Variants datapack!
